text: As I stand in this corridor, gazing into a room aglow with the cold blue of fluorescent light, I sense the mix of sterility and curiosity. There’s anticipation, as if knowledge and creation pulse quietly behind the glass. The environment is clinical yet charged, hinting at secrets of innovation. I feel slightly disoriented by the angles and reflections, but also drawn in, as if standing on the threshold of possibility, invited to cross and discover.
